params.name: Taketori Tale
params.description:
On Aug 22, 912 AD, the Taketori Tale came into being, thereby creating a new writing genre.
Taketori Tale totals about 10 chapters, and recounts the origins of Kaguya, her impossible challenge to her five suitors, and her eventual ascension to the moon as a celestial being. As the first Japanese literary work written in kana, it unified Japan's spoken language with the written word and it pioneered a new genre of writing. It was therefore an important work in the history of Japanese literatur …
